'''Ondos''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] lost long ago. It was located in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> Along with [[Had Abbadon]], it was one of a handful of candidates believed to be the planet of origin for either the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] or their [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-using predecessors.<ref name="POTJ">''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The [[Adventures of the Starkiller, Episode I: The Star Wars|second draft]] of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']] concluded with a roll-up stating that the sons of [[Kane Starkiller|Starkiller]] would have a dangerous quest looking for the "Princess of Ondos".<ref name="The Making of Star Wars">''[[The Making of Star Wars: The Definitive Story Behind the Original Film]]''</ref>
